dc:title: Nature Communications Corpus (2017-2026)
dc:creator: Lakens, Daniel
dc:subject: multidisciplinary science
open access
natural language processing
AI validation
text mining
dc:description: A stratified random sample of 1000 articles published in Nature Communications between 2017 and 2026 (100 per year), converted to metacheck paperlist objects for validation of AI and text-mining tools. This is a sample, not a complete corpus -- the journal publishes thousands of articles per year.
dc:rights: CC-BY 4.0 or CC-BY-NC-ND 4.0, depending on the article -- see manifest.csv

dc:provenance.sampling: 100 articles per year, stratified random sample, seed 20260620
dc:provenance.pdf_source: Unpaywall API with publisher-slug fallback via doi.org redirect resolution
dc:provenance.doi_matching: Verified against CrossRef DOI used for sampling (2026-06-20)
dc:provenance.quality_audit: 1 addendum notice replaced, 1 garbled DOI corrected, 22 missing titles backfilled from CrossRef
